sections.paragraph:
m. (with Kametz impure).-

(1) preciousness, costliness. כְּלִי יְקָר a precious vessel, Pro 20:15. Concr. כָּל־יְקָר whatever is precious, Job 28:10 Jer 20:5.

(2) honour, dignity, Psa 49:13, 21 Ps4 9:21 Est 1:20.

(3) magnificence, Est 1:4.

(4) price (Preis), Zec 11:13.

יקר

m. Chald.-

(1) precious things, Dan 2:6 compare with Isa 3:17 10:3 . Targum.

(2) honour, dignity, Dan 2:37 4:27 , 33 .
